title: Remove or implement all #[allow(dead_code)] in Rust crates
description: Multiple instances of #[allow(dead_code)] violate 'no dead code' rule: lichen-node/src/routing.rs:187 (node_addr), lichen-node/src/secure.rs:101 (get_context), lichen-tui/src/rf_health.rs:51+65 (fields), lichen-tui/src/radio.rs:100, lichen-oscore/tests/vectors.rs. For codereview pass 2. Either remove unused code/fields, implement usage, or redesign. P2 style/consistency. Parent: project-LICHEN-wu53
close_reason: Eliminated all #[allow(dead_code)]: removed unused get_context() in secure.rs, tick() in radio.rs, count fields from Rssi/SnrDisplay (and demo data), pruned unused fields from oscore test Vector/Expected structs. cargo check -p lichen-tui && cargo test -p lichen-oscore --test vectors both clean. No P0-P2.
